summary: E2E testing of niche templates + AgentConfigSection refactor + EmbedChat. Backend: 7/7 pytest passing (templates list, apply-template persists prompt_estructurado in 3 channels + applied_template, 404 unknown template, 403 non-owner, PUT agent-prompts persists prompt_estructurado, /api/chat/message returns 200 with prompt_estructurado set). Frontend: login OK, Agentes IA section loads, 6 niche template chips render & 'Restaurante' click applies template (saludo+CTA+prompt_estructurado update across web_chat/whatsapp/voice tabs), advanced accordion toggle reveals personalidad/tono/etc, web embed snippet contains slug+/embed/chat and NO secrets, SOFIA snippet contains agent-id and NO secrets, /embed/chat?workspace=digiactiva renders ChatWidget (open).
action_items: Pre-existing (not introduced by this change): /crm Hoy section emits a 500 error on initial data fetch in console (Error fetching data: AxiosError). Visible as console error during login → home but does NOT block any flow. Worth investigating in a future iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: AgentConfigSection.jsx (566 LOC) is well-structured: sub-components (Section, ListEditor, TemplatePicker, CodeBlock) extracted, state isolated, useCallback used for fetchers — clean refactor.
Embed snippets correctly avoid leaking secrets: web iframe uses only origin+slug; SOFIA tag uses agent-id from workspace.integrations.sofia.agent_id (no api_key). Verified end-to-end.
niche_templates.py: 6 templates with prompts in all 3 channels. Default merge in apply_niche_template ensures all keys exist after applying — good defensive pattern.
EmbedChat.jsx: minimal, sets transparent background, mounts ChatWidget startOpen — correct for iframe embed use case.
Minor: handleApplyTemplate uses window.confirm (non-shadcn). Acceptable but could be replaced with AlertDialog for consistency with rest of UI.
Minor: workspaces.py update_agent_prompt accepts arbitrary payload dict (no Pydantic validation). Consider a model with optional fields to reject unknown keys.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on verified flows (templates render, apply, channel tabs, advanced toggle, embed snippets without secrets, /embed/chat route)

test_credentials: founder@digiactiva.com / digiactiva2025 (founder_admin) and admin@pastaalvuelo.com / pastaalvuelo2025 (workspace_admin). Both confirmed working.
seed_data_creation: Test mutated DigiActiva web_chat.prompt_estructurado and applied 'restaurante' template to DigiActiva workspace (per request, no rollback critical). Pasta al Vuelo unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Niche templates + AgentConfigSection refactor are GREEN. Test ids in use: template-{id}, agent-tab-{web_chat|whatsapp|voice}, agent-prompt-estructurado, agent-saludo, agent-cta, agent-advanced-toggle, agent-personalidad, agent-tono, agent-planes, agent-promos, agent-nichos-*, agent-preguntas-*, agent-objeciones-*, agent-test-btn, agent-save-btn, embed-web-script, embed-sofia, embed-chat-root. Backend endpoints verified: GET /api/workspaces/_meta/templates (auth required), POST /api/workspaces/{id}/apply-template/{tid} (404 unknown, 403 non-owner, sets applied_template + 3-channel prompts), PUT /api/workspaces/{id}/agent-prompts/{channel} (still works after refactor). Pre-existing console error in /crm Hoy data fetch (500) is NOT related to this change. After applying the test, DigiActiva workspace has applied_template='restaurante' and the saludo was edited to 'TEST SALUDO E2E 🧪' in web_chat. If main agent wants to revert, re-apply original DigiActiva seed prompts via PUT /api/workspaces/{id}/agent-prompts/web_chat.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All requested features work end-to-end.
